title: Tao Te Ching 2: The Relativity of Opposites
description: When the world knows beauty as beauty, ugliness arises. When it knows good as good, evil appears.
introduction: When the world knows beauty as beauty, ugliness arises. When it knows good as good, evil appears.

translation.text: When the whole world knows beauty as beauty, this in itself is ugliness. When the whole world knows good as good, this in itself is evil.
